name: 7ef6c7e1-2542-4e00-ab00-fc754e69ab99
goal: Use deterministic flows to gather required resource configuration information

steps.text: Inform the user that you can help with specifying a new data warehouse on BigQuery or a storage on Google Cloud Storage.
If the user wants a BigQuery data warehouse, route the user directly to ${FLOW:BigQuery Flow}
If the user wants a Cloud Storage bucket, route the user directly to ${FLOW:CloudStorage Flow}
